refinement_sections.content: We need to create a program that can analyze English sentences to find their grammatical structures. This means the program should be able to break down sentences into parts like subjects, verbs, and objects.
The parser should mainly work with regular sentences that make statements (declarative sentences). It should also be able to handle questions and commands, but these might be less important.
I will need to come up with some example sentences to test the parser. These sentences could be simple, like 'The cat sits on the mat,' or questions like 'Where is the cat?'

I should think about how to check if the parser is working well. This could mean looking at how accurately it identifies parts of sentences. I might look for some common standards in the field, but I'm not sure what they are yet.
I need to write a short report explaining how I made the parser, what decisions I took, and any assumptions I had. This will help others understand my work and how the program functions.
